class SparseMultiSet

Detailed Description

template<typename ValueT, typename KeyFunctorT = llvm::identity<unsigned>, typename SparseT = uint8_t>
template<typename SMSPtrTy>
class llvm::SparseMultiSet< ValueT, KeyFunctorT, SparseT >::iterator_base< SMSPtrTy >

Our iterators are iterators over the collection of objects that share a key.

Definition at line 218 of file SparseMultiSet.h.
